events.name: Miami Heat at New York Knicks

headlines.description: — Karl-Anthony Towns scored 39 points and Landry Shamet added a career-high 36 points off the bench as the New York Knicks beat the Miami Heat 140-130 in an NBA Cup game on Friday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Towns, Shamet power Knicks to a 140-130 win over Heat in NBA Cup game

headlines.description: — Franz Wagner scored 25 points, Tristan da Silva added 22 points and nine rebounds and the Orlando Magic held Brooklyn scoreless over the final two-and-a-half minutes for a 105-98 victory over the Nets on Friday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Wagner scores 25 as the Magic shut down Nets late on the way to a 105-98 victory

headlines.description: — Javonte Green scored 21 points and Daniss Jenkins added 19 as the short-handed Detroit Pistons won their ninth straight game, beating the Philadelphia 76ers 114-105 in an NBA Cup game on Friday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Short-handed Pistons win ninth straight game, beating 76ers 114-105

events.name: Portland Trail Blazers at Houston Rockets

headlines.description: — Kevin Durant scored 30 points, Alperen Sengun added 25 points, 10 rebounds and nine assists and the Houston Rockets won their third straight with a 140-116 win over the Portland Trail Blazers in an NBA Cup game on Friday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Durant scores 30 as the Rockets beat the Trail Blazers 140-116 for 3rd straight victory

headlines.description: — Giannis Antetokounmpo had 25 points, 18 assists and seven rebounds in his return and the Bucks outlasted former Milwaukee high school star Kon Knueppel and the Charlotte Hornets 147-134 in overtime Friday night in an NBA Cup game.
headlines.shortLinkText: Antetokounmpo returns to help Bucks outlast Knueppel and Hornets, 147-134 in overtime

headlines.description: — Anthony Edwards scored 30 points and Julius Randle added 26 points and 11 rebounds as the Minnesota Timberwolves pulled away in the fourth quarter and beat the Sacramento Kings 124-110 in an NBA Cup game Friday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Edwards' 30 points power Timberwolves to 3rd straight win, 124-110 over Kings in NBA Cup

highlights.description: The Lakers defeat the Pelicans 118-104 in Willie Green's final game as New Orleans' head coach.

headlines.description: — Austin Reaves scored 31, Luka Doncic had 24 points and 12 assists, and the Los Angeles Lakers cruised to a 118-104 victory over the New Orleans Pelicans in an NBA Cup game on Friday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Doncic, Ayton and Reaves lead the Lakers past the Pelicans 118-104 to improve to 2-0 in NBA Cup play

headlines.description: — James Harden scored four of his 10 overtime points in the second extra period and finished with season highs of 41 points and 14 rebounds, along with 11 assists, as the Los Angeles Clippers beat the Dallas Mavericks 133-127 in an NBA Cup game on...
headlines.shortLinkText: Harden's 82nd career triple-double leads Clippers past Mavericks 133-127 in 2OT in NBA Cup

events.name: Golden State Warriors at San Antonio Spurs

headlines.description: — Stephen Curry had 49 points, outdueling Victor Wembanyama in another intense battle and the Golden State Warriors rallied to beat the San Antonio Spurs 109-108 on Friday night for their first win in the NBA Cup.
headlines.shortLinkText: Curry scores season-high 49 points as Warriors beat Wembanyama, Spurs 109-108 in NBA Cup
